rulings.Case Title: PATRICK BURKE VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Honeywell International, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, alternatively, summary adjudication is off calendar pursuant to the notice of the death of Mr. Burke. = (503/GLW)
